name: search_content
description: Search Spotify's catalog for tracks, artists, albums, playlists, shows, and episodes. Supports filters for year, genre, and market.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query. Supports field filters like 'artist:Radiohead', 'genre:rock', 'year:2020-2024'.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of item types to search. Options: track, artist, album, playlist, show, episode.

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to limit results to a specific market.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per type. Default is 20, maximum is 50.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Index of the first result to return for pagination.
